div.p: Vec<usize> acting as LIFO stack for O(1) entity index recycling
Cache Efficiency: • generations: 6 × 2B = 12B (< 1 cache line) • free_list: 3 × 8B = 24B (< 1 cache line) • Stack ops hit L1 cache after warmup
Stack (LIFO Order) head points to top
Example: Old handle: Entity(index=2, gen=4) Current gen: generations[2] = 5 4 != 5 → STALE is_alive() returns false
